problem_statement_objectives.objective_text: Quantify historical workforce growth patterns across all healthcare sectors (2006-2019)

sub_requirements.requirement: Analyze annual growth rates for doctors, nurses, pharmacists, dentists, and allied health professionals
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Historical Trends Tab - Historical Trends Chart + CAGR Comparison Chart

sub_requirements.requirement: Identify sector-specific trends and variations in public vs private sectors
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Historical Trends Tab - Data aggregation across sectors
Gap Analysis Tab - Density calculations in gap analysis

problem_statement_objectives.objective_text: Develop forecasting models for future workforce supply through 2030

sub_requirements.requirement: Build time series models projecting workforce numbers under current growth scenarios
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Forecasts Tab - Forecast Chart with dotted lines

sub_requirements.requirement: Incorporate demographic trends (aging population, healthcare demand growth)
Generate confidence intervals for workforce projections

problem_statement_objectives.objective_text: Identify critical workforce gaps and shortage risks by sector

sub_requirements.requirement: Compare projected supply against estimated demand based on population aging
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Gap Analysis Tab - Gap Analysis Chart + Timeline

sub_requirements.requirement: Quantify magnitude and timing of potential shortages
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Gap Analysis Tab - Gap Timeline Chart
Executive Summary Tab - Critical Shortages KPI + Insights

problem_statement_objectives.objective_text: Provide scenario analysis for policy interventions

sub_requirements.requirement: Model impact of increased training program capacity
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Gap Analysis Tab - Scenario Filter (Baseline vs OECD)

sub_requirements.requirement: Simulate effects of retention improvement initiatives
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Gap Analysis Tab - Scenario comparison charts

sub_requirements.requirement: Quantify workforce import requirements under different scenarios
sub_requirements.dashboard_component: Gap Analysis Tab - Gap magnitude visualization

IN_DASHBOARD.used_in: Gap Analysis Tab - Gap Chart + Timeline

DOWNLOADABLE.note: Available for download but not visualized in dashboard
Used in calculations but not directly visualized

checks_performed.check: Verify all data files exist before loading
checks_performed.details: DashboardDataLoader gracefully handles missing files with warnings
All columns contain valid data ranges
No null values in visualization columns

components.content: Plain-language problem description and dashboard purpose

storytelling_elements.what: Healthcare workforce is growing but gaps exist vs OECD targets
storytelling_elements.why: Advanced practice nurses growing fastest (28% CAGR), but several professions face critical 2030 gaps
storytelling_elements.action: Prioritize training expansion for professions with critical OECD gaps

components.content: 14-year workforce data across all professions and sectors

storytelling_elements.what: All professions show consistent growth over 14 years
storytelling_elements.why: Driven by MOH strategic investments and population aging
storytelling_elements.action: Use historical CAGR to set realistic growth targets

components.content: 2020-2030 workforce projections based on historical patterns

components.chart_type: Combo line chart (solid historical + dotted forecast)

storytelling_elements.why: Linear extrapolation of historical trends with statistical models
storytelling_elements.action: Plan training capacity to support forecasted supply levels

components.content: Compare projected supply vs demand under different scenarios

storytelling_elements.what: Baseline scenario shows adequate supply; OECD targets reveal gaps
storytelling_elements.why: Singapore's 2019 density ratios trail OECD benchmarks in several professions
storytelling_elements.action: Accelerate training for professions with critical OECD gaps

level_1_entity_specific.insight: Fastest growing profession at 28.3% CAGR (2008-2019), reflecting strategic investment in nursing specialization
Projected surplus under baseline but moderate gap vs OECD target by 2030
Largest profession by count; growing steadily but faces moderate OECD gap by 2030
Consistent 6.9% CAGR growth; transitions from surplus to manageable OECD gap
Growing at 5.7% CAGR but faces critical OECD shortage by 2030

level_2_cross_entity.insight: Growth rate ranking: Advanced Practice Nurses (28%) >> Pharmacists (7%) > Nurses (6%) ≈ Doctors (6%) ≈ Dentists (6%)
Baseline scenario: 5 professions show surplus; OECD scenario: 5 professions face critical/moderate gaps
level_2_cross_entity.implication: Intervention priority depends on benchmark choice

level_3_portfolio_system.insight: Total healthcare workforce projected to grow 32% (2019-2030) under current trends
level_3_portfolio_system.implication: Strong momentum but OECD convergence requires accelerated training expansion in 5 critical professions
level_3_portfolio_system.recommendation: Prioritize training program capacity increases for: Nurses, Doctors, Advanced Practice Nurses, Dentists, Pharmacists

examples: Healthcare workforce is projected to grow 32% by 2030
Advanced practice nurses show fastest growth (28% CAGR)

technical_implementation.data_loading: DashboardDataLoader class - loads once at startup
technical_implementation.caching: In-memory (no external cache required for current scale)

callbacks.purpose: Update historical chart based on profession
Update forecast chart based on profession
Update gap chart based on scenario
Update gap timeline based on profession

deployment_recommendations: Use Gunicorn with 4 workers for production
Add Redis caching for >10 concurrent users
Consider Databricks Dashboard for enterprise deployment

shared_code_decisions.rationale: Dashboard is highly specific to PS-001 workforce data structure and requirements. No generic components suitable for sharing.

about_tab_validation.note: PS-001 reference included in footer but not in main content

immediate: Test dashboard with all professions and scenarios
Conduct user acceptance testing with stakeholders

key_insights_for_stakeholders: Healthcare workforce projected to grow 32% from 2019 to 2030 under current trends
5 professions face critical or moderate shortages vs OECD targets by 2030
Advanced practice nurses show exceptional growth (28% CAGR) reflecting strategic investment
Baseline scenario (maintaining 2019 density) shows adequate supply across all professions
OECD convergence requires accelerated training expansion in nurses, doctors, dentists, pharmacists, and allied health
